narration: Ever heard of the bends? It’s more than just a diving term.
visual_description: Hook visual: Ever heard of the bends? It’s more than just a diving term.

narration: Decompression sickness happens when divers ascend too quickly, causing nitrogen bubbles to form in the bloodstream.
visual_description: Context visual: Decompression sickness happens when divers ascend too quickly, causing nitrogen bubbles to form in the bloodstream.
ai_image_prompt: Context visual: Decompression sickness happens when divers ascend too quickly, causing nitrogen bubbles to form in the bloodstream.
ai_video_prompt: Cinematic motion: Context visual: Decompression sickness happens when divers ascend too quickly, causing nitrogen bubbles to form in the bloodstream.

narration: Symptoms can range from joint pain to life-threatening conditions. But did you know it can also affect surface athletes?
visual_description: Escalation visual: Symptoms can range from joint pain to life-threatening conditions. But did you know it can also affect surface athletes?
ai_image_prompt: Escalation visual: Symptoms can range from joint pain to life-threatening conditions. But did you know it can also affect surface athletes?
ai_video_prompt: Cinematic motion: Escalation visual: Symptoms can range from joint pain to life-threatening conditions. But did you know it can also affect surface athletes?

narration: Nitrogen comes from our air, and when you dive, it dissolves in your tissues. Ascend slowly to avoid bubbles forming.
visual_description: Evidence visual: Nitrogen comes from our air, and when you dive, it dissolves in your tissues. Ascend slowly to avoid bubbles forming.
